    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    A

    ActionMessage - Class in it.polimi.Network.Common
    Represents a discrete action or message sent from the client to the server.
    ActionMessage() - Constructor for class it.polimi.Network.Common.ActionMessage
    Default constructor.
    ActionMessage(String, String, int) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Network.Common.ActionMessage
    Constructs a new ActionMessage with the specified parameters.
    ActionMessage(String, String, int, int, String) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Network.Common.ActionMessage
    Constructs a new ActionMessage including room and pin details.
    ActionMessage(String, String, int, int, String, int) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Network.Common.ActionMessage
    Constructs a new ActionMessage including room, pin, and room size details.
    activate() - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.RMI.RmiClientConnection
    Starts observing game state changes for this client.
    addBuilding(Building) - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Elements.Player
    Adds a building card to the player's collection.
    addCharacter(Character) - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Elements.Player
    Adds a character card to the player's collection.
    addPlayer(String, String) - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.GameRoom
    Adds a player to the room, storing their PIN for future reconnections.
    addPropertyChangeListener(PropertyChangeListener) - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Core.Game
    Registers a listener that will be notified when the game state changes.
    addStar(Player, int) - Method in class it.polimi.Buildings.Ritual.RitualData
    Increments the star count for a specific player.
    AddStar - Class in it.polimi.Buildings.Ritual
    Represents a ritual building that grants stars to the player.
    AddStar(Era, Position, int, int, int) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Buildings.Ritual.AddStar
    Constructs an AddStar ritual building with the specified properties.
    applyCardEffect() - Method in class it.polimi.Abstract.Building
    Applies the standard card effect for the building (e.g., drawing extra cards).
    applyCardEffect() - Method in class it.polimi.Buildings.Turn_End_Card
    Applies the end-of-turn effect.
    applyContinuousEffect() - Method in class it.polimi.Abstract.Building
    Applies a continuous effect triggered during the game.
    applyContinuousEffect(Player) - Method in class it.polimi.Buildings.InGame_Effect
    Applies the continuous effect to the specified player.
    applyDiscountEffect() - Method in class it.polimi.Abstract.Building
    Returns any discount granted by the building for resource gathering or construction.
    applyDiscountEffect(Player) - Method in class it.polimi.Buildings.Event_Sustenance_Effect
    Returns the discount based on the number of matching target characters.
    applyEffect(EventContext) - Method in class it.polimi.Abstract.Event
    Applies the effect of the event to the provided context.
    applyEffect(EventContext) - Method in class it.polimi.Events.Hunting
    Applies the hunting effect to every player within the provided event context.
    applyEffect(EventContext) - Method in class it.polimi.Events.RockPaintings
    Applies the rock paintings effect to all players in the provided context.
    applyEffect(EventContext) - Method in class it.polimi.Events.ShamanicRitual
    Applies the ritual effect to all players in the context.
    applyEffect(EventContext) - Method in class it.polimi.Events.Sustenance
    Applies the sustenance effect to all players in the provided context.
    applyEventsEffect() - Method in class it.polimi.Abstract.Building
    Applies the effect that depends on event interactions.
    applyEventsEffect(Player, Event) - Method in class it.polimi.Buildings.Event_Add_Effect
    Applies the event-based reward to the given player if the event matches.
    applyOrderEffect() - Method in class it.polimi.Abstract.Building
    Applies the effect that depends on order or turn sequence.
    applyOrderEffect() - Method in class it.polimi.Buildings.Turn_Start_Effect
    Applies the turn-start effect based on play order.
    applyRitualEffect() - Method in class it.polimi.Abstract.Building
    Applies ritual-specific effects for the building.
    applyRitualEffect(Player, RitualData) - Method in class it.polimi.Buildings.Ritual.AddStar
    Applies the ritual effect by contributing stars to the player's tally.
    applyRitualEffect(Player, RitualData) - Method in class it.polimi.Buildings.Ritual.Event_Less_Ritual
    Applies the ritual protection effect if the player meets the criteria.
    applyRitualEffect(Player, RitualData, ShamanicRitual) - Method in class it.polimi.Buildings.Ritual.Event_Most_Ritual
    Applies the ritual bonus if the player has the maximum number of stars.
    arrow - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.Constants.InventorIcon
    Arrow icon.
    Artist - Class in it.polimi.Characters
    Represents an Artist character in the game.
    Artist(Era, int) - Constructor for class it.polimi.Characters.Artist
    Constructs an Artist character with the specified era and player count requirement.
    ARTIST - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.Constants.CharacterType
    Represents artistic diversity in the tribe.
    askNickname() - Method in interface it.polimi.Game.Core.GameView
    Prompts the user to provide a unique nickname for the game session.
    askNickname() - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.RMI.RmiVirtualView
    Requests the client to provide a nickname (used during RMI initialization checks).
    askNickname() - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.View.VirtualView
    Initiates the login handshake by requesting a nickname from the client.
    assignToPlayer(Player) - Method in class it.polimi.Abstract.Character
    Assigns this character card to the given player.
    assignToPlayer(Player) - Method in class it.polimi.Abstract.Event
    Events are not assigned to players directly, so this method does nothing.
    assignToPlayer(Player) - Method in class it.polimi.Characters.Hunter
    Assigns this hunter card to the given player.
    assignToPlayer(Player) - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Elements.Tribe
    Assigns the tribe card to the given player.
    availableFor(int) - Method in class it.polimi.Game.Elements.OfferTile
    Returns whether this tile can be used with the given player count.
